install.WARNING: The npm package name is EXACTLY '@openai/codex'. Do NOT confuse with '@anthropic-ai/claude-code' (that is Claude Code, a completely different tool). Do NOT install 'codex' alone (wrong package).
install.note: Codex CLI is OpenAI's open-source coding agent (built in Rust, distributed via npm). Requires Node.js >= 22. After install, verify with 'codex --version'. On Windows, run directly in PowerShell — do NOT use WSL. Codex is a LOCAL-ONLY CLI tool — it cannot be deployed on remote servers.

identity_guard.description: Codex CLI is made by OpenAI. It is NOT Claude Code (Anthropic), NOT OpenCode (Charm/Anomaly), and NOT GitHub Copilot. These are four completely different products.

common_confusions.claude_code: Claude Code is by Anthropic (@anthropic-ai/claude-code). Codex is by OpenAI (@openai/codex). They are DIFFERENT tools.
common_confusions.opencode: OpenCode is by Charm/Anomaly (opencode-ai). Codex is by OpenAI (@openai/codex). They are DIFFERENT tools.
common_confusions.github_copilot: GitHub Copilot is a VS Code extension. Codex CLI is a terminal-based agent. They are DIFFERENT tools.
